rows.label: qev086911_MSG0002
rows.name:
Well, we bought the stuff we
had off some Nopon traders.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086911_MSG0003
rows.name: Why not start by asking them?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086911_MSG0004
rows.name:
I imagine their source is some
kind of trade secret, so getting
it out of them won't be easy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086911_MSG0005
rows.name:
But they might let slip a rumor or two,
at least? Maybe you'll get lucky.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086911_MSG0006
rows.name:
Construction work should be able
to start up again just as soon
as they get that aerozium.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086911_MSG0007
rows.name:
I can't imagine it'll be easy
to find, but good luck.[ST:wait ]
